llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final coverage plan lists all policies under the LifeFirst provider. We need to map each component to the corresponding ground-truth rating. For health coverage, the LifeFirst Standard Plan appears as both physical and mental health coverage, each rated 9. For property coverage, LifeFirst Standard Coverage is rated 9. For travel coverage, LifeFirst Standard Plan under travel insurance is rated 9. The additional services listed include adventure/sports add-on, concierge services, 24/7 support, and a dedicated advisor. These correspond to Adventure Travel Coverage (rating 10), Concierge Services (rating 2), and 24/7 Travel Assistance (rating 4) from the travel_enhancement_services section, as well as Premium Insurance Membership (rating 6) from general_services for the dedicated advisor feature.
